copy.no_questions_were_collected_in_the_selec: No questions were collected in the selected period - there is no data basis for this row.
copy.too_few_questions_in_the_period_conclusi: Too few questions in the period - conclusions for this row are very partial.
copy.many_questions_were_collected_you_can_re: Many questions were collected - you can rely more on what you see for this topic.
copy.there_are_enough_questions_for_this_topi: There are enough questions for this topic - cautious changes to sub-skills only.
copy.there_are_enough_questions_you_can_rely_: There are enough questions - you can rely more on what you see for this topic.
copy.moderate_data_cautious_changes_only_are_: Moderate data - cautious changes only are recommended.
copy.how_much_information_is_available_affect: How much information is available affects how cautious the next recommendation is.
copy.this_shows_up_across_several_practice_se: This shows up across several practice sessions - the picture reflects a trend, not just a single session.
copy.the_recommendation_is_based_on_a_combina: The recommendation is based on a combination of accuracy, question count, mistakes, and how recent practice was in the selected period.
